title: Moroccan contingent arrives in Israel to join international Gaza force

snapshot.title: Moroccan contingent arrives in Israel to join international Gaza force
snapshot.description: JERUSALEM: Officers from the Moroccan military, whose deployment was announced in February, have arrived in Israel to join a nascent international force for Gaza, US President Donald Trump’s Board of Peace said Tuesday. An official from the board separately told AFP on condition of anonymity that the contingent arrived on June 18 at the headquarters of the International
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Moroccan contingent arrives in Israel to join international Gaza force | Arab News
